key.name: gap-size
key.description: Pixels to inset target rectangles after calculating a window action.

key.name: almost-maximize-padding
key.description: Pixels to inset windows for the almost-maximize action.

key.name: move-step
key.description: Pixels used by move adjustment actions.

key.name: resize-step
key.description: Pixels used by larger and smaller resize adjustment actions.

key.name: enable-window-throw
key.description: Move the focused window with pointer motion while Super and Alt are held.

key.name: window-throw-frame-interval
key.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for window throw pointer motion.

key.name: enable-drag-snapping
key.description: Enable Rectangle-style edge and corner snapping while dragging windows.

key.name: snap-edge-size
key.description: Distance in pixels from an edge that activates side snapping.

key.name: snap-corner-size
key.description: Distance in pixels from a corner that activates quarter snapping.

key.name: snap-preview-opacity
key.description: Opacity setting for the snap footprint overlay.

key.name: shortcut-left-half
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Left Half window action.

key.name: shortcut-right-half
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Right Half window action.

key.name: shortcut-top-half
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Top Half window action.

key.name: shortcut-bottom-half
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Bottom Half window action.

key.name: shortcut-top-left
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Top Left window action.

key.name: shortcut-top-right
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Top Right window action.

key.name: shortcut-bottom-left
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Bottom Left window action.

key.name: shortcut-bottom-right
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the Bottom Right window action.

key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the First Third window action.
